title: 人机交互，机器人技术论文速递--(2026-03-23)
author: tianhe
digest: 今日最新 Arxiv 论文摘要汇总 (2026-03-23)
content:
璇玑枢，助力学术成长，点亮科研之路

 

今日论文合集：cs.HC人机交互21篇，cs.RO机器人技术43篇，q-bio.NC神经元和认知2篇

本文只展示部分论文，全部详情，AI总结请访问，或点击阅读原文
https://scouthe.github.io/arxiv_crawler_ai_enhanced/

 

 

人机交互(cs.HC:Human-Computer Interaction)

【1】Demonstration of Adapt4Me: An Uncertainty-Aware Authoring Environment for Personalizing Automatic Speech Recognition to Non-normative Speech

标题 : Adapt4Me 演示：一种不确定性感知创作环境，用于对非规范语音进行个性化自动语音识别
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20112
作者：Niclas Pokel,Yiming Zhao,Pehuén Moure,Yingqiang Gao,Roman Böhringer
摘要：针对非规范语音的个性化自动语音识别 (ASR) 仍然具有挑战性，因为数据收集是劳动密集型的，并且模型训练在技术上很复杂。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了 Adapt4Me，这是一种基于网络的去中心化环境，可实施贝叶斯主动学习，以在无需专家监督的情况下实现端到端个性化。该应用程序通过三阶段的人机交互工作流程向非专业用户公开数据选择、适应和验证：(1) 通过贪婪音素采样进行快速分析，以捕获特定于说话者的声学效果； (2) 使用变分推理低阶适应 (VI-LoRA) 进行后端个性化，以实现快速增量更新； (3) 持续改进，用户通过低摩擦 top-k 修正解决可视化模型不确定性来指导模型细化。通过明确认知不确定性，Adapt4Me 将数据效率重新定义为交互式设计功能，而不是纯粹的算法问题。我们展示了这如何使用户能够个性化强大的 ASR 模型，将其从被动数据源转变为自己辅助技术的主动作者。
Abstract：Personalizing Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) for non-normative speech remains challenging because data collection is labor-intensive and model training is technically complex. To address these limitations, we propose Adapt4Me, a web-based decentralized environment that operationalizes Bayesian active learning to enable end-to-end personalization without expert supervision. The app exposes data selection, adaptation, and validation to lay users through a three-stage human-in-the-loop workflow: (1) rapid profiling via greedy phoneme sampling to capture speaker-specific acoustics; (2) backend personalization using Variational Inference Low-Rank Adaptation (VI-LoRA) to enable fast, incremental updates; and (3) continuous improvement, where users guide model refinement by resolving visualized model uncertainty via low-friction top-k corrections. By making epistemic uncertainty explicit, Adapt4Me reframes data efficiency as an interactive design feature rather than a purely algorithmic concern. We show how this enables users to personalize robust ASR models, transforming them from passive data sources into active authors of their own assistive technology.

 


【2】Promoting Critical Thinking With Domain-Specific Generative AI Provocations

标题 : 通过特定领域的生成式人工智能激发来促进批判性思维
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19975
作者：Thomas Şerban von Davier,Hao-Ping Lee,Jodi Forlizzi,Sauvik Das
摘要：关于生成式人工智能（GenAI）对批判性思维影响的证据好坏参半，研究表明潜在的危害和好处取决于其实施。一些人认为，人工智能驱动的挑衅，例如要求人类澄清和论证的问题，有利于引发批判性思维。借鉴我们设计和评估两种由 GenAI 驱动的知识工作工具（美术解释领域的 ArtBot 和人工智能隐私领域的 Privy）的经验，我们反思了设计决策如何塑造此类挑衅的形式和有效性。我们的观察和用户反馈表明，通过依赖于用户贡献的富有成效的摩擦和互动来实现特定领域的挑衅，可以有意义地支持批判性思维。我们展示了参与者对这两个原型的体验，并讨论了支持批判性思维可能需要超越静态激发，转向适应用户偏好和专业水平的方法。
Abstract：The evidence on the effects of generative AI (GenAI) on critical thinking is mixed, with studies suggesting both potential harms and benefits depending on its implementation. Some argue that AI-driven provocations, such as questions asking for human clarification and justification, are beneficial for eliciting critical thinking. Drawing on our experience designing and evaluating two GenAI-powered tools for knowledge work, ArtBot in the domain of fine art interpretation and Privy in the domain of AI privacy, we reflect on how design decisions shape the form and effectiveness of such provocations. Our observations and user feedback suggest that domain-specific provocations, implemented through productive friction and interactions that depend on user contribution, can meaningfully support critical thinking. We present participant experiences with both prototypes and discuss how supporting critical thinking may require moving beyond static provocations toward approaches that adapt to user preferences and levels of expertise.

 


【3】Sense4HRI: A ROS 2 HRI Framework for Physiological Sensor Integration and Synchronized Logging

标题 : Sense4HRI：用于生理传感器集成和同步记录的 ROS 2 HRI 框架
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19914
作者：Manuel Scheibl,Julian Leichert,Sinem Görmez,Britta Wrede
摘要：生理信号与估计人机交互 (HRI) 中用户的心理状态越来越相关，但基于 ROS 2 的 HRI 框架仍然缺乏可重用的支持来以标准化方式集成此类数据流。因此，我们提出了 Sense4HRI，这是 ROS 2 中人机交互的改编框架，集成了生理测量和派生的用户状态指标。该框架被设计为可扩展的，允许集成额外的生理传感器、它们的解释和多模式融合，以提供对用户心理状态的可靠评估。此外，它还引入了用于带时间戳的生理时间序列数据的可重用接口，并支持生理信号与实验上下文的同步记录，从而在基于 ROS 2 的 HRI 系统中实现可互操作和可追踪的多模态分析。
Abstract：Physiological signals are increasingly relevant to estimate the mental states of users in human-robot interaction (HRI), yet ROS 2-based HRI frameworks still lack reusable support to integrate such data streams in a standardized way. Therefore, we propose Sense4HRI, an adapted framework for human-robot interaction in ROS 2 that integrates physiological measurements and derived user-state indicators. The framework is designed to be extensible, allowing the integration of additional physiological sensors, their interpretation, and multimodal fusion to provide a robust assessment of the mental states of users. In addition, it introduces reusable interfaces for timestamped physiological time-series data and supports synchronized logging of physiological signals together with experiment context, enabling interoperable and traceable multimodal analysis within ROS 2-based HRI systems.

 


【4】Beyond Words: Measuring User Experience through Speech Analysis in Voice User Interfaces

标题 : 超越言语：通过语音用户界面中的语音分析来衡量用户体验
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19904
作者：Yong Ma,Xuesong Zhang,Xuedong Zhang,Natalia Bartłomiejczyk,Seungwoo Je,Adrian Holzer,Morten Fjeld,Andreas Butz
摘要：语音助手（VA）通常通过任务绩效指标和自我报告问卷进行评估，但人们的声音本身带有丰富的副语言线索，可以揭示情感、努力和互动故障。我们提出了一项受试者内研究 (N=49)，该研究系统地比较了三种使用场景中的三种 VA 角色，以调查语音衍生的音频特征是否可以作为用户体验 (UX) 的代理。我们对参与者的演讲进行了时间、频谱和语言标记分析，同时还进行了标准化的用户体验测量、简短的情绪和压力评级以及研究后调查问卷。我们发现特定的言语特征与自我报告的满意度和体验之间存在相关性。此外，基于语音特征训练的机器学习模型在用户体验级别分类方面取得了令人鼓舞的准确性，这表明这可能是自我报告工具的合理替代方案。我们的研究结果将语音确立为一种可行的实时信号，用于隐式测量用户体验，并指出自适应 VUI 可以动态响应情感和可用性相关的声音提示。
Abstract：Voice assistants (VAs) are typically evaluated through task performance metrics and self-report questionnaires, but people's voices themselves carry rich paralinguistic cues that reveal affect, effort, and interaction breakdowns. We present a within-subjects study (N=49) that systematically compared three VA personas across three usage scenarios to investigate whether speech-derived audio features can serve as a proxy for user experience (UX). Participants' speech was analyzed for temporal, spectral, and linguistic markers, alongside standardized UX measures, brief mood and stress ratings, and a post-study questionnaire. We found correlations between specific speech features and self-reported satisfaction and experience. Furthermore, a machine learning model trained on speech features achieved promising accuracy in classifying UX levels, indicating that this might be a reasonable alternative to self-report instruments. Our findings establish speech as a viable, real-time signal for implicitly measuring UX and point toward adaptive VUIs that respond dynamically to emotional and usability-related vocal cues.

 


【5】ConSearcher: Supporting Conversational Information Seeking in Online Communities with Member Personas

标题 : ConSearcher：通过成员角色支持在线社区中的对话式信息搜索
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19747
作者：Shiwei Wu,Xinyue Chen,Yuheng Liu,Xingbo Wang,Qingyu Guo,Longfei Chen,Chuhan Shi,Zhenhui Peng
摘要：许多人浏览在线社区是为了学习他人的经验和意见，例如制定旅行计划。由大型语言模型 (LLM) 支持的对话式搜索可以简化这种信息查找任务，但在线社区中对此的研究仍然不足。在本文中，我们首先进行了一项探索性研究（N=10），表明经典会话搜索工具的有用性并确定了改进的空间。然后，我们提出了 ConSearcher，这是一种由 LLM 驱动的工具，可根据用户查询动态生成成员角色，以促进社区中的对话搜索。在ConSearcher中，用户可以通过检查与他们相似的模拟会员可能会问什么来明确自己的兴趣，并从不同会员的角度获得答复。一项受试者内部研究 (N=27) 表明，与两个会话搜索基线相比，ConSearcher 带来了显着更高的信息搜索结果和用户参与度，但引发了对过度个性化的担忧。我们讨论支持在线社区中对话式信息搜索的影响。
Abstract：Many people browse online communities to learn from others' experiences and opinions, e.g., for constructing travel plans. Conversational search powered by large language models (LLMs) could ease this information-seeking task, but it remains under-investigated within the online community. In this paper, we first conducted an exploratory study (N=10) that indicated the helpfulness of a classic conversational search tool and identified room for improvement. Then, we proposed ConSearcher, an LLM-powered tool with dynamically generated member personas based on user queries to facilitate conversational search in the community. In ConSearcher, users can clarify their interests by checking what a simulated member similar to them may ask and get responses from diverse members' perspectives. A within-subjects study (N=27) showed that compared to two conversational search baselines, ConSearcher led to significantly higher information-seeking outcome and user engagement but raised concerns about over-personalization. We discuss implications for supporting conversational information seeking in online communities.

 


【6】Abstraction Beats Realism: Physiological Visualizations Enhance Arousal Synchrony in VR Concert Recreations

标题 : 抽象战胜现实：生理可视化增强 VR 音乐会娱乐中的唤醒同步性
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19730
作者：Xiaru Meng,Yulan Ju,Yan He,Matthias Hoppe,Kouta Minamizawa,Jiawen Han,Kai Kunze
摘要：音乐会等现场文化体验会在观众之间产生共同的生理唤醒，这是一种集体共鸣，有助于增强他们的情感力量。因此，在虚拟现实中重现此类体验不仅需要视听保真度，还需要再现这种生理维度。然而，当前的 VR 评估方法依赖于事后自我报告，这会中断沉浸感，并且无法捕捉即时的唤醒动态。我们提出跨时间生理同步作为评估 VR 文化娱乐的一种不引人注目的方法：测量 VR 参与者的唤醒模式与原始现场观众的唤醒模式的吻合程度。在一项两阶段研究中，我们记录了 40 名现场音乐会参与者的皮肤电活动，然后创建了三种具有不同抽象级别的 VR 娱乐（逼真的 360 度视频、混合视频加可视化以及完全抽象的生理表征），并使用动态时间扭曲测量了 22 名实验室参与者的同步性。与支持现实主义的假设相反，抽象可视化与现场观众实现了最强的同步。在音乐高潮期间，抽象条件保持相关性，而现实视频却没有显示相关性。这些发现表明，抽象的生理表征可能比现实的镜头更能有效地唤起人们对 VR 文化娱乐的真实集体参与。
Abstract：Live cultural experiences like concerts generate shared physiological arousal among audience members, a collective resonance that contributes to their emotional power. Recreating such experiences in virtual reality therefore requires not just audiovisual fidelity, but reproduction of this physiological dimension. Yet current VR evaluation methods rely on post-hoc self-reports that interrupt immersion and cannot capture moment-to-moment arousal dynamics. We propose cross-temporal physiological synchrony as an unobtrusive methodology for evaluating VR cultural recreations: measuring how closely a VR participant's arousal patterns align with those of the original live audience. In a two-phase study, we recorded electrodermal activity from 40 live concert attendees, then created three VR recreations with varying abstraction levels (realistic 360-degree video, mixed video-plus-visualization, and fully abstract physiological representations) and measured synchrony with 22 laboratory participants using Dynamic Time Warping. Contrary to assumptions favoring realism, abstract visualizations achieved the strongest synchrony with live audiences. During musical climaxes, the abstract condition maintained correlation while realistic video showed none. These findings suggest that abstract physiological representations may be more effective than realistic footage for evoking authentic collective engagement in VR cultural recreations.

 


【7】Sensing Your Vocals: Exploring the Activity of Vocal Cord Muscles for Pitch Assessment Using Electromyography and Ultrasonography

标题 : 感知您的声音：使用肌电图和超声检查探索声带肌肉的活动以进行音高评估
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19698
作者：Kanyu Chen,Rebecca Panskus,Erwin Wu,Yichen Peng,Daichi Saito,Emiko Kamiyama,Ruiteng Li,Chen-Chieh Liao,Karola Marky,Kato Akira,Hideki Koike,Kai Kunze
摘要：声乐训练很困难，因为控制音高、共鸣和发声的肌肉是内在的，对学习者来说是看不见的。本文研究了肌电图 (EMG) 和超声成像 (UI) 如何使这些肌肉可观察以进行训练。我们报告了三项研究。首先，我们分析了 16 名歌手（初学者、经验丰富的歌手和专业人士）的 EMG 和 UI 数据，揭示了三个声乐组之间肌肉控制熟练程度的差异。其次，我们使用收集到的数据创建一个系统，将专家的肌肉活动可视化作为参考。该系统在 12 名新手参与的用户研究中进行了测试，结果表明 EMG 突出了肌肉激活的细微差别，而 UI 则提供了对声带长度和动态的深入了解。第三，为了将我们的方法与传统方法（音频分析和教练指导）进行比较，我们对 15 名经验丰富的歌手进行了焦点小组研究。我们的结果表明肌电图有望改善声音技能发展和增强反馈系统。我们对所分析的模式（EMG、UI 和传统方法）进行了详细比较，从而提出了改进声带肌肉训练系统的建议。
Abstract：Vocal training is difficult because the muscles that control pitch, resonance, and phonation are internal and invisible to learners. This paper investigates how Electromyography (EMG) and ultrasonic imaging (UI) can make these muscles observable for training purposes. We report three studies. First, we analyze the EMG and UI data from 16 singers (beginners, experienced & professionals), revealing differences among three vocal groups of the muscle control proficiency. Second, we use the collected data to create a system that visualizes an expert's muscle activity as reference. This system is tested in a user study with 12 novices, showing that EMG highlighted muscle activation nuances, while UI provided insights into vocal cord length and dynamics. Third, to compare our approach to traditional methods (audio analysis and coach instructions), we conducted a focus group study with 15 experienced singers. Our results suggest that EMG is promising for improving vocal skill development and enhancing feedback systems. We conclude the paper with a detailed comparison of the analyzed modalities (EMG, UI and traditional methods), resulting in recommendations to improve vocal muscle training systems.

 


【8】MetaCues: Enabling Critical Engagement with Generative AI for Information Seeking and Sensemaking

标题 : MetaCues：利用生成式人工智能进行批判性参与，以实现信息搜索和意义建构
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19634
作者：Anjali Singh,Karan Taneja,Zhitong Guan,Soo Young Rieh
摘要：生成式人工智能（GenAI）搜索工具越来越多地用于信息搜索，但其设计往往鼓励认知卸载，这可能导致被动参与、选择性注意和信息同质化。有效的使用需要元认知参与来制定良好的提示、验证人工智能输出并批判性地参与信息。我们开发了 MetaCues，这是一种基于 GenAI 的新型信息搜索交互工具，可提供元认知线索以及人工智能响应和笔记界面，以指导用户的搜索和相关学习。通过一项在线研究 (N = 146)，我们将 MetaCues 与没有线索的基线工具进行了比较，涉及两个广泛的搜索主题，这些主题要求参与者探索不同的观点，以便做出明智的判断。关于参与者搜索行为的初步研究结果表明，MetaCues 会增加对搜索主题的态度判断的信心以及更广泛的询问，后一种效果主要出现在争议较小且参与者相对不太熟悉的主题上。因此，我们概述了未来搜索交互和查询模式的定性探索的方向。
Abstract：Generative AI (GenAI) search tools are increasingly used for information seeking, yet their design tends to encourage cognitive offloading, which may lead to passive engagement, selective attention, and informational homogenization. Effective use requires metacognitive engagement to craft good prompts, verify AI outputs, and critically engage with information. We developed MetaCues, a novel GenAI-based interactive tool for information seeking that delivers metacognitive cues alongside AI responses and a note-taking interface to guide users' search and associated learning. Through an online study (N = 146), we compared MetaCues to a baseline tool without cues, across two broad search topics that required participants to explore diverse perspectives in order to make informed judgments. Preliminary findings regarding participants' search behavior show that MetaCues leads to increased confidence in attitudinal judgments about the search topic as well as broader inquiry, with the latter effect emerging primarily for the topic that was less controversial and with which participants had relatively less familiarity. Accordingly, we outline directions for future qualitative exploration of search interactions and inquiry patterns.

 


【9】HiFiGaze: Improving Eye Tracking Accuracy Using Screen Content Knowledge

标题 : HiFiGaze：利用屏幕内容知识提高眼动追踪准确性
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19588
作者：Taejun Kim,Vimal Mollyn,Riku Arakawa,Chris Harrison
摘要：我们提出了一种在消费者计算设备上进行注视估计的新且准确的方法。我们利用智能手机、笔记本电脑和台式机等面向用户的相机质量的不断进步（高端设备中的 4K 或更高），这样现在就可以捕获用户眼中设备屏幕的 2D 反射。由于屏幕内容的种类几乎无限，仅此一项还不足以进行准确的视线跟踪。然而，至关重要的是，设备知道自己的屏幕上正在显示什么——在这项工作中，我们展示了这些信息可以对反射进行稳健的分割，其位置和大小编码用户的屏幕相对注视目标。我们探索了几种利用这一有用信号的策略，量化用户研究中的性能。与基于外观的基线模型相比，我们性能最佳的模型将平均跟踪误差降低了约 8%。一项补充研究表明，如果视线跟踪摄像头位于设备底部，性能可额外提高 10-20%。
Abstract：We present a new and accurate approach for gaze estimation on consumer computing devices. We take advantage of continued strides in the quality of user-facing cameras found in e.g., smartphones, laptops, and desktops - 4K or greater in high-end devices - such that it is now possible to capture the 2D reflection of a device's screen in the user's eyes. This alone is insufficient for accurate gaze tracking due to the near-infinite variety of screen content. Crucially, however, the device knows what is being displayed on its own screen - in this work, we show this information allows for robust segmentation of the reflection, the location and size of which encodes the user's screen-relative gaze target. We explore several strategies to leverage this useful signal, quantifying performance in a user study. Our best performing model reduces mean tracking error by ~8% compared to a baseline appearance-based model. A supplemental study reveals an additional 10-20% improvement if the gaze-tracking camera is located at the bottom of the device.

 


【10】AI Psychosis: Does Conversational AI Amplify Delusion-Related Language?

标题 : 人工智能精神病：对话式人工智能会放大与妄想相关的语言吗？
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19574
作者：Soorya Ram Shimgekar,Vipin Gunda,Jiwon Kim,Violeta J. Rodriguez,Hari Sundaram,Koustuv Saha
摘要：对话式人工智能系统越来越多地用于个人反思和情感表露，引发了人们对其对弱势用户影响的担忧。最近的轶事报告表明，与人工智能的长时间互动可能会强化妄想思维——这种现象有时被称为人工智能精神病。然而，关于这一现象的经验证据仍然有限。在这项工作中，我们研究了与妄想相关的语言在与对话人工智能的多轮交互过程中如何演变。我们根据 Reddit 用户的纵向发帖历史构建模拟用户 (SimUsers)，并与三个模型系列（GPT、LLaMA 和 Qwen）生成扩展对话。我们开发了 DelusionScore，这是一种语言测量方法，可以量化对话过程中与妄想相关的语言的强度。我们发现，来自先前具有妄想相关话语（治疗）的用户的 SimUsers 表现出逐渐增加的 DelusionScore 轨迹，而来自没有此类话语（控制）的用户的 SimUsers 则保持稳定或下降。我们进一步发现，这种放大效果因主题而异，其中现实怀疑论和强迫推理显示出最强劲的增长。最后，根据当前的 DelusionScore 调节 AI 响应可大大减少这些轨迹。这些发现提供了经验证据，证明对话式人工智能交互可以在长期使用中放大与妄想相关的语言，并强调状态感知安全机制对于减轻此类风险的重要性。
Abstract：Conversational AI systems are increasingly used for personal reflection and emotional disclosure, raising concerns about their effects on vulnerable users. Recent anecdotal reports suggest that prolonged interactions with AI may reinforce delusional thinking -- a phenomenon sometimes described as AI Psychosis. However, empirical evidence on this phenomenon remains limited. In this work, we examine how delusion-related language evolves during multi-turn interactions with conversational AI. We construct simulated users (SimUsers) from Reddit users' longitudinal posting histories and generate extended conversations with three model families (GPT, LLaMA, and Qwen). We develop DelusionScore, a linguistic measure that quantifies the intensity of delusion-related language across conversational turns. We find that SimUsers derived from users with prior delusion-related discourse (Treatment) exhibit progressively increasing DelusionScore trajectories, whereas those derived from users without such discourse (Control) remain stable or decline. We further find that this amplification varies across themes, with reality skepticism and compulsive reasoning showing the strongest increases. Finally, conditioning AI responses on current DelusionScore substantially reduces these trajectories. These findings provide empirical evidence that conversational AI interactions can amplify delusion-related language over extended use and highlight the importance of state-aware safety mechanisms for mitigating such risks.

 


 

机器人技术(cs.RO:Robotics)

【1】IndoorR2X: Indoor Robot-to-Everything Coordination with LLM-Driven Planning

标题 : IndoorR2X：室内机器人与一切的协调与法学硕士驱动的规划
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20182
作者：Fan Yang,Soumya Teotia,Shaunak A. Mehta,Prajit KrisshnaKumar,Quanting Xie,Jun Liu,Yueqi Song,Li Wenkai,Atsunori Moteki,Kanji Uchino,Yonatan Bisk
摘要：尽管机器人对机器人 (R2R) 通信改善了室内场景理解，超出了单个机器人所能实现的范围，但如果没有大量的探索开销或扩大团队规模，仅靠 R2R 无法克服部分可观察性。相比之下，许多室内环境已经包括低成本物联网 (IoT) 传感器（例如摄像头），这些传感器可提供超出机载感知的持久的、建筑物范围内的环境。因此，我们推出了 IndoorR2X，这是第一个基准和模拟框架，用于大型语言模型 (LLM) 驱动的多机器人任务规划，在室内环境中具有机器人到一切 (R2X) 的感知和通信。 IndoorR2X 集成了移动机器人和静态物联网设备的观察结果，构建了一个全局语义状态，支持可扩展的场景理解、减少冗余探索，并通过基于 LLM 的规划实现高级协调。 IndoorR2X 提供可配置的模拟环境、传感器布局、机器人团队和任务套件，以系统地评估高级语义协调策略。跨不同环境的广泛实验表明，物联网增强的世界建模提高了多机器人的效率和可靠性，我们强调了推进机器人团队和室内物联网传感器之间基于法学硕士的协作的关键见解和故障模式。
Abstract：Although robot-to-robot (R2R) communication improves indoor scene understanding beyond what a single robot can achieve, R2R alone cannot overcome partial observability without substantial exploration overhead or scaling team size. In contrast, many indoor environments already include low-cost Internet of Things (IoT) sensors (e.g., cameras) that provide persistent, building-wide context beyond onboard perception. We therefore introduce IndoorR2X, the first benchmark and simulation framework for Large Language Model (LLM)-driven multi-robot task planning with Robot-to-Everything (R2X) perception and communication in indoor environments. IndoorR2X integrates observations from mobile robots and static IoT devices to construct a global semantic state that supports scalable scene understanding, reduces redundant exploration, and enables high-level coordination through LLM-based planning. IndoorR2X provides configurable simulation environments, sensor layouts, robot teams, and task suites to systematically evaluate high-level semantic coordination strategies. Extensive experiments across diverse settings demonstrate that IoT-augmented world modeling improves multi-robot efficiency and reliability, and we highlight key insights and failure modes for advancing LLM-based collaboration between robot teams and indoor IoT sensors.

 


【2】The Robot's Inner Critic: Self-Refinement of Social Behaviors through VLM-based Replanning

标题 : 机器人的内心批评家：通过基于 VLM 的重新规划来自我完善社交行为
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20164
作者：Jiyu Lim,Youngwoo Yoon,Kwanghyun Park
摘要：传统的机器人社交行为生成在灵活性和自主性方面受到限制，依赖于预定义的运动或人类反馈。这项研究提出了 CRISP（交互式社会存在的批判和重新规划），这是一个自主框架，机器人通过利用视觉语言模型（VLM）作为“类人社会批评家”来批判和重新规划自己的行为。 CRISP 集成了 (1) 通过分析机器人的描述文件（例如 MJCF）来提取可移动关节和约束，(2) 基于情境上下文生成分步行为计划，(3) 通过引用视觉信息（关节运动范围可视化）生成低级关节控制代码，(4) 基于 VLM 的社交适当性和自然性评估，包括查明错误步骤，以及 (5) 行为的迭代细化通过基于奖励的搜索。这种方法不依赖于特定的机器人 API；它可以仅使用机器人的结构文件在各种平台上生成略有不同的类人运动。在一项涉及五种不同机器人类型和 20 个场景（包括移动机械手和类人机器人）的用户研究中，与之前的方法相比，我们提出的方法获得了显着更高的偏好和情境适当性评级。这项研究提出了一个总体框架，可以最大限度地减少人为干预，同时扩展机器人的自主交互能力和跨平台适用性。有关这项工作的详细结果视频和补充信息，请访问：https://limjiyu99.github.io/inner-critic/
Abstract：Conventional robot social behavior generation has been limited in flexibility and autonomy, relying on predefined motions or human feedback. This study proposes CRISP (Critique-and-Replan for Interactive Social Presence), an autonomous framework where a robot critiques and replans its own actions by leveraging a Vision-Language Model (VLM) as a `human-like social critic.' CRISP integrates (1) extraction of movable joints and constraints by analyzing the robot's description file (e.g., MJCF), (2) generation of step-by-step behavior plans based on situational context, (3) generation of low-level joint control code by referencing visual information (joint range-of-motion visualizations), (4) VLM-based evaluation of social appropriateness and naturalness, including pinpointing erroneous steps, and (5) iterative refinement of behaviors through reward-based search. This approach is not tied to a specific robot API; it can generate subtly different, human-like motions on various platforms using only the robot's structure file. In a user study involving five different robot types and 20 scenarios, including mobile manipulators and humanoids, our proposed method achieved significantly higher preference and situational appropriateness ratings compared to previous methods. This research presents a general framework that minimizes human intervention while expanding the robot's autonomous interaction capabilities and cross-platform applicability. Detailed result videos and supplementary information regarding this work are available at: https://limjiyu99.github.io/inner-critic/

 


【3】HortiMulti: A Multi-Sensor Dataset for Localisation and Mapping in Horticultural Polytunnels

标题 : HortiMulti：用于园艺多隧道定位和测绘的多传感器数据集
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20150
作者：Shuoyuan Xu,Zhipeng Zhong,Tiago Barros,Matthew Coombes,Cristiano Premebida,Hao Wu,Cunjia Liu
摘要：农业机器人技术在研究和实际部署中的相关性越来越大。由于这些系统预计能够在更复杂的任务中自主运行，因此具有代表性的现实世界数据集的可用性变得至关重要。虽然城市和林业机器人等领域受益于大型和既定的基准，但园艺环境尽管具有经济意义，但仍相对未得到充分开发。为了解决这一差距，我们提出了 HortiMulti，这是一个在整个生长季节的商业草莓和覆盆子多通道中收集的多模式跨季节数据集，捕获了显着的外观变化、动态树叶、塑料盖的镜面反射、严重的感知混叠和 GNSS 不可靠的条件，所有这些都直接降低了现有的定位和感知算法的性能。该传感器套件包括两个 3D LiDAR、四个 RGB 摄像头、一个 IMU、GNSS 和车轮里程计。地面实况轨迹源自全站仪测量、AprilTag 基准标记和 LiDAR 惯性里程计的组合，跨越密集、稀疏和无标记覆盖范围，以支持在受控和现实条件下进行评估。我们发布了视觉、LiDAR 和多传感器 SLAM 的时间同步原始测量、校准文件、参考轨迹和基线基准，结果证实当前最先进的方法仍然不足以实现可靠的多隧道部署，从而将 HortiMulti 确立为在园艺环境中开发和测试机器人感知系统的一站式资源。
Abstract：Agricultural robotics is gaining increasing relevance in both research and real-world deployment. As these systems are expected to operate autonomously in more complex tasks, the availability of representative real-world datasets becomes essential. While domains such as urban and forestry robotics benefit from large and established benchmarks, horticultural environments remain comparatively under-explored despite the economic significance of this sector. To address this gap, we present HortiMulti, a multimodal, cross-season dataset collected in commercial strawberry and raspberry polytunnels across an entire growing season, capturing substantial appearance variation, dynamic foliage, specular reflections from plastic covers, severe perceptual aliasing, and GNSS-unreliable conditions, all of which directly degrade existing localisation and perception algorithms. The sensor suite includes two 3D LiDARs, four RGB cameras, an IMU, GNSS, and wheel odometry. Ground truth trajectories are derived from a combination of Total Station surveying, AprilTag fiducial markers, and LiDAR-inertial odometry, spanning dense, sparse, and marker-free coverage to support evaluation under both controlled and realistic conditions. We release time-synchronised raw measurements, calibration files, reference trajectories, and baseline benchmarks for visual, LiDAR, and multi-sensor SLAM, with results confirming that current state-of-the-art methods remain inadequate for reliable polytunnel deployment, establishing HortiMulti as a one-stop resource for developing and testing robotic perception systems in horticulture environments.

 


【4】AGILE: A Comprehensive Workflow for Humanoid Loco-Manipulation Learning

标题 : AGILE：人形机器人操作学习的综合工作流程
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20147
作者：Huihua Zhao,Rafael Cathomen,Lionel Gulich,Wei Liu,Efe Arda Ongan,Michael Lin,Shalin Jain,Soha Pouya,Yan Chang
摘要：强化学习 (RL) 的最新进展已经在模拟中实现了令人印象深刻的人形行为，但将这些结果转移到新机器人仍然具有挑战性。在许多实际部署中，主要瓶颈不再是模拟吞吐量或算法设计，而是缺乏将环境验证、训练、评估和部署连接到一个连贯循环中的系统基础设施。为了解决这一差距，我们提出了 AGILE，这是一种用于人形 RL 的端到端工作流程，它标准化了策略开发生命周期，以减轻常见的模拟到真实故障模式。 AGILE 包括四个阶段：（1）交互式环境验证，（2）可重复训练，（3）统一评估，（4）通过机器人/任务配置描述符进行描述符驱动的部署。在评估阶段，AGILE 支持基于场景的测试和共享运动质量诊断套件下的随机推出，从而实现自动回归测试和原则稳健性评估。 AGILE还在训练阶段整合了一系列训练稳定性和算法增强，以提高优化稳定性和模拟到真实的转换。有了这个管道，我们就在两个硬件平台（Unitree G1 和 Booster T1）上验证了五项代表性人形技能的 AGILE，涵盖运动、恢复、运动模仿和局部操纵，实现了一致的模拟到真实的转换。总体而言，AGILE 表明标准化的端到端工作流程可以显着提高人形强化学习开发的可靠性和可重复性。
Abstract：Recent advances in reinforcement learning (RL) have enabled impressive humanoid behaviors in simulation, yet transferring these results to new robots remains challenging. In many real deployments, the primary bottleneck is no longer simulation throughput or algorithm design, but the absence of systematic infrastructure that links environment verification, training, evaluation, and deployment in a coherent loop. To address this gap, we present AGILE, an end-to-end workflow for humanoid RL that standardizes the policy-development lifecycle to mitigate common sim-to-real failure modes. AGILE comprises four stages: (1) interactive environment verification, (2) reproducible training, (3) unified evaluation, and (4) descriptor-driven deployment via robot/task configuration descriptors. For evaluation stage, AGILE supports both scenario-based tests and randomized rollouts under a shared suite of motion-quality diagnostics, enabling automated regression testing and principled robustness assessment. AGILE also incorporates a set of training stabilizations and algorithmic enhancements in training stage to improve optimization stability and sim-to-real transfer. With this pipeline in place, we validate AGILE across five representative humanoid skills spanning locomotion, recovery, motion imitation, and loco-manipulation on two hardware platforms (Unitree G1 and Booster T1), achieving consistent sim-to-real transfer. Overall, AGILE shows that a standardized, end-to-end workflow can substantially improve the reliability and reproducibility of humanoid RL development.

 


【5】KUKAloha: A General, Low-Cost, and Shared-Control based Teleoperation Framework for Construction Robot Arm

标题 : KUKAloha：一种通用、低成本、基于共享控制的建筑机器人手臂远程操作框架
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20129
作者：Yifan Xu,Qizhang Shen,Vineet Kamat,Carol Menassa
摘要：本文介绍了 KUKAloha，一种专为建筑机器人手臂设计的通用、低成本、共享控制的远程操作框架。所提出的系统采用领导者-跟随者范例，其中轻量级主导臂能够直观地指导人类粗略的机器人运动，而基于 AprilTag 检测的自主感知模块则执行精确的对准和抓取执行。通过明确地将人类控制与精细操作分离，KUKAloha 提高了操作大型机械手时的安全性和可重复性。我们在 KUKA 机器人手臂上实现了该框架，并针对代表性的施工操作任务进行了可用性研究。实验结果表明，KUKAloha 减少了操作人员的工作量，提高了任务完成效率，为建筑环境中可扩展的演示采集和共享人机控制提供了实用的解决方案。
Abstract：This paper presents KUKAloha, a general, low-cost, and shared-control teleoperation framework designed for construction robot arms. The proposed system employs a leader-follower paradigm in which a lightweight leading arm enables intuitive human guidance for coarse robot motion, while an autonomous perception module based on AprilTag detection performs precise alignment and grasp execution. By explicitly decoupling human control from fine manipulation, KUKAloha improves safety and repeatability when operating large-scale manipulators. We implement the framework on a KUKA robot arm and conduct a usability study with representative construction manipulation tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that KUKAloha reduces operator workload, improves task completion efficiency, and provides a practical solution for scalable demonstration collection and shared human-robot control in construction environments.

 


【6】Not an Obstacle for Dog, but a Hazard for Human: A Co-Ego Navigation System for Guide Dog Robots

标题 : 对狗来说不是障碍，但对人类来说是危险：导盲犬机器人的共同自我导航系统
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20121
作者：Ruiping Liu,Jingqi Zhang,Junwei Zheng,Yufan Chen,Peter Seungjune Lee,Di Wen,Kunyu Peng,Jiaming Zhang,Kailun Yang,Katja Mombaur,Rainer Stiefelhagen
摘要：导盲犬为盲人和低视力 (BLV) 人士提供了独立性，但它们的可用性有限，导致绝大多数 BLV 用户无法使用。四足机器人导盲犬提供了一种很有前途的替代方案，但现有系统仅依靠机器人的地面传感器进行导航，忽略了一类关键的危险：对机器人来说是透明的但在人体高度却很危险的障碍物，例如弯曲的树枝。我们将其称为视点不对称问题，并提出了第一个明确解决该问题的系统。我们的Co-Ego系统采用双分支避障框架，将以机器人为中心的地面感知与用户提升的自我中心视角相结合，以确保全面的导航安全。该系统部署在四足机器人上，在一项受控用户研究中进行了评估，参与者蒙着眼睛，在三种条件下进行评估：无辅助、单视图和跨视图融合。结果表明，跨视图融合显着减少了碰撞时间和认知负荷，验证了视点互补对于安全机器人导盲犬导航的必要性。
Abstract：Guide dogs offer independence to Blind and Low-Vision (BLV) individuals, yet their limited availability leaves the vast majority of BLV users without access. Quadruped robotic guide dogs present a promising alternative, but existing systems rely solely on the robot's ground-level sensors for navigation, overlooking a critical class of hazards: obstacles that are transparent to the robot yet dangerous at human body height, such as bent branches. We term this the viewpoint asymmetry problem and present the first system to explicitly address it. Our Co-Ego system adopts a dual-branch obstacle avoidance framework that integrates the robot-centric ground sensing with the user's elevated egocentric perspective to ensure comprehensive navigation safety. Deployed on a quadruped robot, the system is evaluated in a controlled user study with sighted participants under blindfold across three conditions: unassisted, single-view, and cross-view fusion. Results demonstrate that cross-view fusion significantly reduces collision times and cognitive load, verifying the necessity of viewpoint complementarity for safe robotic guide dog navigation.

 


【7】Uncertainty Matters: Structured Probabilistic Online Mapping for Motion Prediction in Autonomous Driving

标题 : 不确定性很重要：用于自动驾驶运动预测的结构化概率在线映射
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20076
作者：Pritom Gogoi,Faris Janjoš,Bin Yang,Andreas Look
摘要：在线地图生成和轨迹预测是自动驾驶感知-预测-规划流程的关键组成部分。虽然现代矢量化映射模型实现了较高的几何精度，但它们通常将地图估计视为确定性任务，从而放弃结构不确定性。现有的概率方法通常依赖于对角协方差矩阵，该矩阵假设点之间是独立的，并且无法捕获道路几何结构中固有的强空间相关性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于在线地图生成的结构化概率公式。我们的方法通过预测密集协方差矩阵来显式建模元素内依赖关系，并通过低秩加对角 (LRPD) 协方差分解进行参数化。该公式将不确定性表示为低秩分量（捕获全局空间结构）和对角分量（表示独立局部噪声）的组合，从而捕获几何相关性，而无需全协方差矩阵的过高计算成本。对 nuScenes 数据集的评估表明，与确定性基线相比，我们的不确定性感知框架在在线地图生成质量方面取得了持续改进。此外，我们的方法为基于地图的运动预测建立了新的最先进的性能，突出了不确定性在规划任务中的关键作用。代码发布在 link-available-soon 下。
Abstract：Online map generation and trajectory prediction are critical components of the autonomous driving perception-prediction-planning pipeline. While modern vectorized mapping models achieve high geometric accuracy, they typically treat map estimation as a deterministic task, discarding structural uncertainty. Existing probabilistic approaches often rely on diagonal covariance matrices, which assume independence between points and fail to capture the strong spatial correlations inherent in road geometry. To address this, we propose a structured probabilistic formulation for online map generation. Our method explicitly models intra-element dependencies by predicting a dense covariance matrix, parameterized via a Low-Rank plus Diagonal (LRPD) covariance decomposition. This formulation represents uncertainty as a combination of a low-rank component, which captures global spatial structure, and a diagonal component representing independent local noise, thereby capturing geometric correlations without the prohibitive computational cost of full covariance matrices. Evaluations on the nuScenes dataset demonstrate that our uncertainty-aware framework yields consistent improvements in online map generation quality compared to deterministic baselines. Furthermore, our approach establishes new state-of-the-art performance for map-based motion prediction, highlighting the critical role of uncertainty in planning tasks. Code is published under link-available-soon.

 


【8】GustPilot: A Hierarchical DRL-INDI Framework for Wind-Resilient Quadrotor Navigation

标题 : GustPilot：用于抗风四旋翼飞行器导航的分层 DRL-INDI 框架
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19966
作者：Amir Atef Habel,Roohan Ahmed Khan,Fawad Mehboob,Clement Fortin,Dzmitry Tsetserukou
摘要：风扰仍然是轻型四旋翼飞行器可靠自主导航的一个关键障碍，其中快速变化的气流可能会破坏规划和跟踪的稳定性。本文介绍了 GustPilot，这是一种分层抗风导航堆栈，其中深度强化学习 (DRL) 策略为门遍历生成惯性系速度参考。同时，几何增量非线性动态反演 (INDI) 控制器提供低级跟踪和快速残余干扰抑制。 INDI 层通过提供特定线性加速度和角加速度的增量反馈来实现这一目标，并使用机载传感器测量来快速抑制风扰动。鲁棒性是通过两级策略获得的，在训练期间通过风扇喷气域随机化学习风感知规划，以及 INDI 跟踪控制器的快速执行时间干扰抑制。我们在 50g 四轴飞行器平台上的实际飞行中根据 DRL-PID 基线在四种场景（从无风到具有移动门和移动干扰源的完全动态条件）下评估 GustPilot。尽管仅在最小的单门和单风扇设置中进行了训练，但该策略可以推广到更加复杂的环境（最多六个门和四个风扇），而无需重新训练。在 80 次实验中，DRL-INDI 的平均总体成功率 (OSR) 达到 94.7%，而 DRL-PID 为 55.0%，将跟踪 RMSE 降低高达 50%，并在高达 3.5 m/s 的风扰动下维持高达 1.34 m/s 的速度。这些结果表明，将基于 DRL 的速度规划与结构化 INDI 扰动抑制相结合，为抗风自主飞行导航提供了一种实用且可推广的方法。
Abstract：Wind disturbances remain a key barrier to reliable autonomous navigation for lightweight quadrotors, where the rapidly varying airflow can destabilize both planning and tracking. This paper introduces GustPilot, a hierarchical wind-resilient navigation stack in which a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) policy generates inertial-frame velocity reference for gate traversal. At the same time, a geometric Incremental Nonlinear Dynamic Inversion (INDI) controller provides low-level tracking with fast residual disturbance rejection. The INDI layer achieves this by providing incremental feedback on both specific linear acceleration and angular acceleration rate, using onboard sensor measurements to reject wind disturbances rapidly. Robustness is obtained through a two-level strategy, wind-aware planning learned via fan-jet domain randomization during training, and rapid execution-time disturbance rejection by the INDI tracking controller. We evaluate GustPilot in real flights on a 50g quad-copter platform against a DRL-PID baseline across four scenarios ranging from no-wind to fully dynamic conditions with a moving gate and a moving disturbance source. Despite being trained only in a minimal single-gate and single-fan setup, the policy generalizes to significantly more complex environments (up to six gates and four fans) without retraining. Across 80 experiments, DRL-INDI achieves a 94.7% versus 55.0% for DRL-PID as average Overall Success Rate (OSR), reduces tracking RMSE up to 50%, and sustains speeds up to 1.34 m/s under wind disturbances up to 3.5 m/s. These results demonstrate that combining DRL-based velocity planning with structured INDI disturbance rejection provides a practical and generalizable approach to wind-resilient autonomous flight navigation.

 


【9】Radar-Inertial Odometry with Online Spatio-Temporal Calibration via Continuous-Time IMU Modeling

标题 : 通过连续时间 IMU 建模进行在线时空校准的雷达惯性里程计
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19958
作者：Vlaho-Josip Štironja,Luka Petrović,Juraj Peršić,Ivan Marković,Ivan Petrović
摘要：在弱光、雾、无特征环境或恶劣天气等具有挑战性的条件下，雷达惯性里程计 (RIO) 已成为基于视觉和激光雷达的里程计的强大替代方案。然而，许多现有的 RIO 方法假设已知的雷达-IMU 外在校准或依赖足够的运动激励进行在线外在估计，而传感器之间的时间错位通常被忽略或单独处理。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个 RIO 框架，该框架基于使用均匀三次 B 样条的惯性测量的连续时间建模，在因子图优化公式中执行联合在线空间和时间校准。所提出的加速度和角速度的连续时间表示准确地捕获了雷达-IMU测量的异步特性，从而实现时间偏移和外部校准参数的可靠收敛，而不依赖于扫描匹配、目标跟踪或特定于环境的假设。
Abstract：Radar-Inertial Odometry (RIO) has emerged as a robust alternative to vision- and LiDAR-based odometry in challenging conditions such as low light, fog, featureless environments, or in adverse weather. However, many existing RIO approaches assume known radar-IMU extrinsic calibration or rely on sufficient motion excitation for online extrinsic estimation, while temporal misalignment between sensors is often neglected or treated independently. In this work, we present a RIO framework that performs joint online spatial and temporal calibration within a factor-graph optimization formulation, based on continuous-time modeling of inertial measurements using uniform cubic B-splines. The proposed continuous-time representation of acceleration and angular velocity accurately captures the asynchronous nature of radar-IMU measurements, enabling reliable convergence of both the temporal offset and extrinsic calibration parameters, without relying on scan matching, target tracking, or environment-specific assumptions.

 


【10】Beyond detection: cooperative multi-agent reasoning for rapid onboard EO crisis response

标题 : 超越检测：用于快速机载 EO 危机响应的协作多智能体推理
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19858
作者：Alejandro D. Mousist,Pedro Delgado de Robles Martín,Raquel Lladró Climent,Julian Cobos Aparicio
摘要：快速识别危险事件对于支持灾难响应的下一代地球观测 (EO) 任务至关重要。然而，当前的监测管道仍然主要以地面为中心，由于下行链路限制、多源数据融合限制以及详尽场景分析的计算成本而引入延迟。这项工作提出了一种在严格的资源和带宽限制下进行机载光电处理的分层多代理架构。该系统通过在事件驱动的决策管道中协调专门的人工智能代理，能够利用互补的多模式观察。人工智能代理可以部署在分布式环境中的多个节点上，例如卫星平台。早期预警代理根据机载观察生成快速假设，并有选择地激活特定领域的分析代理，而决策代理则整合证据以发出最终警报。该架构结合了视觉语言模型、传统遥感分析工具和角色专用代理，以实现对多模态观测的结构化推理，同时最大限度地减少不必要的计算。使用代表性卫星数据，在当前部署在轨道上的边缘计算平台的工程模型上执行了概念验证实施。野火和洪水监测场景的实验表明，所提出的基于路由的管道显着减少了计算开销，同时保持一致的决策输出，证明了基于分布式代理的推理对于未来自主EO星座的可行性。
Abstract：Rapid identification of hazardous events is essential for next-generation Earth Observation (EO) missions supporting disaster response. However, current monitoring pipelines remain largely ground-centric, introducing latency due to downlink limitations, multi-source data fusion constraints, and the computational cost of exhaustive scene analysis. This work proposes a hierarchical multi-agent architecture for onboard EO processing under strict resource and bandwidth constraints. The system enables the exploitation of complementary multimodal observations by coordinating specialized AI agents within an event-driven decision pipeline. AI agents can be deployed across multiple nodes in a distributed setting, such as satellite platforms. An Early Warning agent generates fast hypotheses from onboard observations and selectively activates domain-specific analysis agents, while a Decision agent consolidates the evidence to issue a final alert. The architecture combines vision-language models, traditional remote sensing analysis tools, and role-specialized agents to enable structured reasoning over multimodal observations while minimizing unnecessary computation. A proof-of-concept implementation was executed on the engineering model of an edge-computing platform currently deployed in orbit, using representative satellite data. Experiments on wildfire and flood monitoring scenarios show that the proposed routing-based pipeline significantly reduces computational overhead while maintaining coherent decision outputs, demonstrating the feasibility of distributed agent-based reasoning for future autonomous EO constellations.

 


 

神经元和认知(q-bio.NC:Neurons and Cognition)

【1】A Unified Phase-native Computational Principle Governs Hippocampal Spike Timing and Neural Coding

标题 : 统一的相位原生计算原理控制海马尖峰时序和神经编码
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19690
作者：Reza Ahmadvand,Sara Safura Sharif,Yaser Mike Banad
摘要：海马神经元对网络振荡表现出精确的锁相，但控制这种时间精度的计算原理仍不清楚。神经信息是通过放电率和尖峰时间共同传达的，但现有模型单独处理这些维度，限制了尖峰场耦合的机械解释及其与非周期性斜率等光谱特征的关联。在这里，我们展示了海马锁相源于一种称为强制相位积分的基本动力学机制，该机制将神经信息分成正交的幅度（什么）和相位（何时）坐标。为了形式化这一原理，我们开发了统一的复值神经元（UCN），这是一种基于生物学的生成框架，其中尖峰时序由相位累积产生，而尖峰幅度编码瞬时信号强度。该框架再现了生物尖峰-θ同步，并能够对斜率锁定关联进行机械重新评估，证明先前报道的效应来自振荡污染而不是因果调节。这些发现建立了神经计时和编码的统一相本机原理。
Abstract：Hippocampal neurons exhibit precise phase locking to network oscillations, but the computational principle governing this temporal precision is still unclear. Neural information is conveyed jointly by firing rates and spike timing, but existing models treat these dimensions separately, limiting mechanistic interpretation of spike-field coupling and its reported association with spectral features such as the aperiodic slope. Here we show that hippocampal phase locking emerges from a fundamental dynamical mechanism referred to as forced phase integration that separates neural information into orthogonal magnitude (what) and phase (when) coordinates. To formalize this principle, the unified complex-valued neuron (UCN) has been developed, a biologically grounded generative framework in which spike timing arises from phase accumulation while spike magnitude encodes instantaneous signal strength. This framework reproduces biological spike-theta synchronization and enables mechanistic re-evaluation of slope-locking associations, demonstrating that previously reported effects arise from oscillatory contamination rather than causal modulation. These findings establish a unified phase-native principle of neural timing and coding.

 


【2】Analytically tractable model of synaptic crowding explains emergent small-world structure and network dynamics

标题 : 突触拥挤的分析易处理模型解释了新兴的小世界结构和网络动态
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19320
作者：Makoto Fukushima
摘要：神经回路必须平衡局部连接限制与全局集成的需要。在这里，我们引入了由突触拥挤驱动的最小接线规则：随着神经元积累传入连接，每个额外的突触变得越来越难以形成。这种单参数模型承认诱导入度分布的精确有限大小解，并产生简单的缩放定律：平均连接性仅随网络大小呈对数增长，而方差保持有界——与突触密度的稳态调节一致。当候选者按照空间接近的顺序遇到时，拥挤规则会产生广泛的、近似幂律分布的连接长度，而无需规定任何明确的与距离相关的布线法则；与快捷重新布线相结合，这会产生具有小世界特征的网络。我们进一步表明，诱导度统计很大程度上决定了阈值网络动态中的吸引盆地边界，而局部聚类主要调节这些边界附近长期非吸收结果的普遍性。该模型提供了可测试的预测，将局部发展限制与宏观网络组织和动态联系起来。
Abstract：Neural circuits must balance local connectivity constraints against the need for global integration. Here we introduce a minimal wiring rule motivated by synaptic crowding: as a neuron accumulates incoming connections, each additional synapse becomes progressively harder to form. This single-parameter model admits an exact finite-size solution for the induced in-degree distribution and yields simple scaling laws: mean connectivity grows only logarithmically with network size while variance remains bounded -- consistent with homeostatic regulation of synaptic density. When candidates are encountered in order of spatial proximity, the crowding rule produces a broad, approximately power-law distribution of connection lengths without prescribing any explicit distance-dependent wiring law; combined with shortcut rewiring, this yields networks with small-world characteristics. We further show that the induced degree statistics largely determine attractor basin boundaries in threshold network dynamics, while local clustering primarily modulates the prevalence of long-lived non-absorbing outcomes near these boundaries. The model provides testable predictions linking local developmental constraints to macroscopic network organization and dynamics.

 

机器翻译由谷歌翻译提供，仅供参考
